content.en:
Forbidden Land of the Sea of Bones.

It was very calm here, a famous bone soldier and bone general were cultivating here, and even the bone king was cultivating, without any nervousness, as if he had forgotten Ye Tian's invasion of the forbidden land of the Bone Sea.

Moreover, there are only thirty Bone Kings here, and the other Bone Kings have all returned to the Bone Clan.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the forbidden land of the Sea of Bones again, and as soon as he entered here, the incompatible aura was naturally discovered by the Bone Kings, and it was useless to hide it.

"Damn, that ancestor is here again!!!"

The Bone Kings said angrily.

Rumble!!!!

Thirty bone kings went to stop Ye Tian, and a large number of bone generals also formed a battle formation to stop them, as for the bone soldiers, how far they fled.

Moreover, some of the bone soldiers returned to the bone clan to rescue, otherwise they would not be able to rely on these bone kings alone, Ye Tian would probably lose some clansmen again.

Thundered!!!!

Thirty Bone Kings besieged Ye Tian, and they didn't use the Bone Sword because the Bone Sword had already been sent back to the Bone Clan.

After all, it was a supreme emperor weapon, but it didn't belong to them, and the last time it was a temporary loan, so it was impossible to keep it here.

Without the Supreme Emperor Weapon, how could they deal with Ye Tian?

Soon, Ye Tian found out that they didn't have the bone sword, and he was immediately excited.

Immediately, he began to deal with the bone generals.

"Kill!"

A battle array was shattered, and a famous bone was severely damaged.

Then, with a pinch of his hand, Ye Tian pinched a bone general into pieces, leaving only a bone bead, which was instantly put away.

Bang bang bang!!!

A famous bone general had no power to fight back at all, and was blown up one after another, turning into bone beads.

The bone kings are extremely angry, the bone generals are the high-level combat power of the bone clan, and the loss of one is not a small loss, but now they have lost so much.

Abrupt.

A bone king was hit hard by Ye Tian's full force, and flew out directly, and the bones on his body were cracked, as if they were falling apart.

Although the bone crack healed instantly, the injury did not recover so quickly.

Next, Ye Tian directly aimed at this bone king and attacked him with all his strength, and under the successive attacks, this bone king couldn't bear it anymore, and was hit hard and was dying.

The other Bone Kings tried to stop it, but they couldn't.

Ye Tian's strength is too strong now, and it is not something they can withstand at all.

Moreover, at this moment, Ye Tian used three defensive ultimate ancestral skills, directly ignoring the attacks of these bone kings, desperately trying to kill a bone king.

"Shabai, run away!"

The other bone kings hurriedly said.

Shabai, the battered and dying Bone King.

However, his speed was too slow.

Ye Tian's speed was much faster than him, and once he wanted to escape, Ye Tian stopped him.

Finally.

Under Ye Tian's punch, the bone king's body was completely shattered, and it could no longer heal, turning into a bone bead.

This bone bead has golden veins, and it is far larger than ordinary bone beads.

This is the Bone King Bone Bead!

When a bone king fell, those bone generals were panicked, and even several bone kings were panicked.

The Bone Kings are also afraid of falling, and it is said that when they broke into this place, they only fell when they opened up the Bone Sea Forbidden Land, or when they clashed with other powerful forces during the Dark Forbidden Land Tribulation, they would fall some Bone Kings.

As for the confrontation with the Ancestor of the Dark Forbidden Realm, there was almost never a Bone King who fell.

But now, a Bone King has fallen into the hands of the Ancestor of the Dark Forbidden Realm.

"Don't escape, besiege him with all your might, and wait for reinforcements to arrive!"

A bone king commanded.

Those bone generals had no choice, they didn't dare to escape, they desperately stopped Ye Tian, lest Ye Tian invade the door, once the door was destroyed, they would be the sinners of the bone clan!

Even if they knew very well that Ye Tian longed for the bone beads, they would wait for death if they let the bone generals stay here, but even if they used their lives to pile up, they had to stop Ye Tian.

Thundered!!!!

A venerable bone will continue to fall, and the bone kings will also continue to be injured, and they will not be able to compete with Ye Tian at all.

At this moment, they are also very urgent and want rescue to come as soon as possible.

Otherwise, the Bone Sea Forbidden Land is afraid that a large number of bone generals and even bone kings will be slaughtered.

That's when it happened.

A venerable Bone King passed through the door and came to the Forbidden Land of the Sea of Bones, one of the Bone Kings held a bone sword, which was the strongest emperor weapon of the Bone Clan.

"Kill the Ancestor!"

The Bone Kings who rushed over said angrily.

I saw that the bone king holding the bone sword didn't say a word, and began to urge the bone sword, vowing to use this supreme emperor weapon to bombard Ye Tian.

Last time, they used this imperial weapon to severely damage Ye Tian, causing Ye Tian to die of heavy injuries, and in the end, they couldn't compete with their bone kings, and they were surrounded and killed.

They can definitely still besiege Ye Tian this time, after all, the top ancestor can't compete with the Supreme Emperor Weapon.

Kill!

The bone sword turned into a ray of light and killed Ye Tian.

This moment.

Ye Tian instantly activated that sect's defense ultimate ancestral technique.

A total of twenty Defensive Ultimate Ancestral Techniques turned into layers of shields to protect Ye Tian.

Click!!!

The bone sword stabbed down, and layers of shields were pierced.

But when it pierced the tenth shield, it finally stopped.

Ye Tian blocked the blow of the Supreme Emperor's weapon.

And the Bone King who urged the Supreme Emperor Weapon was extremely weak at the moment.

Ye Tian used the Streamer Ultimate Ancestral Technique and approached the Bone King, the two Bone Kings were protecting the weak Bone King, but unfortunately they couldn't stop Ye Tian, and they were directly blown away by Ye Tian.

As for the extremely weak Bone King, he had no power to resist at all, and was killed by Ye Tian's blow.

The second Bone King has fallen!

As for the Supreme Emperor Weapon, it also fell into Ye Tian's hands.

"Impossible, the Supreme Emperor Weapon can't hurt him?"

A famous bone king was terrified.

In their eyes, even if it is an ordinary Supreme Ancestor combat power, there is no way to be attacked by the Supreme Emperor Weapon without being injured!

In fact, in order to resist that blow, Ye Tian did consume one-tenth of the power of the Ancestor, and only then did he block the Supreme Emperor Weapon.

Then, Ye Tian canceled some defensive ultimate ancestral skills, otherwise he would not be able to maintain his combat effectiveness for too long.

Soon, ten minutes passed.

At this time, Ye Tian killed a large number of Bone Kings, and killed another Bone King, which was equivalent to killing three Bone Kings.

And a famous bone king of the bone clan came to support, and maybe there will be an even more powerful bone clan coming.

In addition, the consumption of the power of the ancestor on Ye Tian's body is very serious, and his combat effectiveness has seriously declined, if he fights for a while, he is afraid that his strength will be exhausted.

So, Ye Tian tried to leave.

"Leave our clan's supreme emperor weapon !!!"

Those bone kings were crazy, but Ye Tian ignored them at all.

Wow!

Ye Tian withstood the twenty-layer defense Ultimate Ancestral Technique, broke out of the encirclement, and left the Bone Sea Forbidden Land.

And at the moment he left, he seemed to sense a suffocating aura, and even the bone sword that he put away seemed to have broken through the air and left.

But as soon as Ye Tian came back to the Dark Forbidden Realm, the Bone Sword was honest, and only a faint roar came out, shaking the entire Bone Sea Forbidden Land.
